causal_question: For countries that newly experienced at least one fatal armed conflict in 2003-2005, how did the log of annual non-fuel mineral exploration investment change relative to countries that remained conflict-free in both 2000-2002 and 2003-2005?
vague_question: How did mining exploration investment change in countries that first experienced deadly armed conflict in 2003-2005, compared with countries that remained peaceful during that period?
